home.heroTitle: Safety, healing, and a path forward for every girl we serve.
home.heroCopy: Kateri provides safe housing, counseling, and reintegration support for girls, with a focused commitment to Native American communities.

protect.title: Protect:
protect.body: Provide immediate safety through secure housing and coordinated case management.

restore.title: Restore:
restore.body: Support healing through counseling, education, and individualized interventions.

reintegrate.title: Reintegrate:
reintegrate.body: Prepare residents for long-term success through family engagement and reintegration planning.

home.sistersAlt: Three sisters sitting together in a sunlit field.

name.heading: Why the name Kateri?
name.body: The organization is named in honor of Saint Kateri Tekakwitha, widely recognized as the first Native American saint. The name reflects a commitment to dignity, resilience, and culturally respectful care for the communities Kateri serves.
name.portraitAlt: Portrait of Kateri Tekakwitha in golden grasses.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: Reach out to learn more about Kateri, partnership opportunities, and ways to support our mission.

login.title: Sign in
login.lead: Welcome back to Kateri. Donor and Resident users can sign up directly. Staff and Admin accounts are created by an administrator.

twoFactor.requiresSetupNotice: Admin and Staff accounts must enable two-factor authentication. After you sign in with your password, you will be taken to Profile to finish setup.
twoFactor.successLead: Enter your 6-digit authenticator code, or a one-time recovery code (format XXXXX-XXXXX). Use this same field for both.
twoFactor.infoMessage: Success, one more step: enter your authenticator code to finish signing in.

signup.title: Create account
signup.lead: New users can sign up as Donor or Resident. Staff and Admin accounts are created by administrators.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Kateri collects personal data needed to operate resident support workflows, donor reporting, and secure account access. This includes account identifiers, contact details, donation records, and authorized operational case information.

We process data for service delivery, safeguarding, recordkeeping, and security. We do not sell personal data. Access is limited through role-based permissions and authenticated sessions.

Data may be retained only as long as needed for operational, legal, and safeguarding requirements. When retention periods expire, records are deleted or anonymized where feasible.

You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data, and you may ask questions about processing or consent choices. Contact support to submit requests so the team can respond according to applicable privacy obligations.

Cookie and consent details are documented in the Cookie Policy. Essential security cookies are required for protected areas, while optional preferences can be managed through the cookie banner.

Last updated: April 2026.

cookiePolicy.heading: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.body:
Kateri uses essential cookies to keep users signed in, protect account sessions, and maintain secure site behavior. These cookies are required for authentication and cannot be disabled while using protected features.

You can choose between accepting all cookies or accepting necessary cookies only. Necessary cookies support login, session continuity, and security controls. Optional cookies will only be enabled when accepted.

Last updated: April 2026.

unauthorized.body: You do not have permission to view this page.

impact.heading: Our Impact
impact.lead: Kateri measures impact through protection, recovery, justice support, and long-term empowerment for girls and their families.

health.heading: Health & Well-being Impact
health.subtitle: Residents showing score improvement over time
health.improvedSummary: {percent}% improved from first to latest check.
health.basis: Based on residents with 2+ health records.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Safety is the first step of healing. Kateri focuses on immediate protection and stable support so every girl can begin recovery in a secure environment.

healing.title: Healing
healing.description: After safety is established, healing can begin. We support emotional recovery through counseling, mentorship, and consistent care.

justice.title: Justice
justice.description: Kateri does not pressure decisions about legal action. We support each girl in pursuing the path of justice that is right for her.

empowerment.title: Empowerment
empowerment.description: Our goal is to help girls move from victimhood to leadership and advocacy through life skills, education, and confidence-building opportunities.

safehouse.heading: See the Safehouse
safehouse.lead: Explore a modeled safehouse layout featuring bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, a playroom, and a learning room. Drag to rotate and pinch or scroll to zoom.
safehouse.noWebgl: Your browser does not support WebGL, so the 3D model cannot load here. Try a modern browser version on desktop or mobile.
safehouse.insideBody: This concept house includes 10 bedrooms with two bunk-bed sets in each room, 5 bathrooms, central circulation space, and shared areas for meals, play, and learning. The design is intentionally simple to spotlight capacity, flow, and a warm environment for residents.

donorImpact.title: Where your generosity goes
donorImpact.subtitle: Trace every dollar a donor has given through the safehouses they've funded — see the residents reached, the programs supported, and the outcomes the data shows.
donorImpact.selectPrompt: Select a donor on the left to see their personalized impact report.

stat.residentsCaption: At funded safehouses, during your support period

howGiftsHelp.heading: How we put donations to use
howGiftsHelp.lead: Gifts are routed into care on the ground—not held in a generic fund. Here's how your support typically helps.
howGiftsHelp.point1: Safe shelter, food, clothing, and daily structure so children have stability while they heal.
howGiftsHelp.point2: Counseling, education, life-skills, and family support so residents can move forward with confidence.
howGiftsHelp.point3: Program supplies, local partnerships, and staff costs that keep each safehouse running day to day.
howGiftsHelp.point4: Flex funding for emergencies and operations when a site needs backup or a crisis drives up demand.
howGiftsHelp.closing: Every contribution stacks with others to pay for real beds, real sessions, and real meals—thank you for fueling that mission.

myImpact.title: Where your generosity goes
myImpact.subtitle: Trace every dollar you've given through the safehouses you've funded — see the residents reached, the programs supported, and the outcomes the data shows.
myImpact.noDonations: You haven't made any donations yet.

errors.notLinked: Your account is not linked to a donor profile yet. Contact us to connect your giving record.
errors.failedLoad: Failed to load your impact report

profile.updateLead: Update how Kateri should address you and your contact details below.
profile.updateLeadShort: Update how Kateri should address you and your contact details.
profile.informationLead: Changes are saved on this device and applied across the app for your account. Your first name and last name come from your login and are not editable here.

field.signInIdHelper: Letters, numbers, and . _ @ + - only. You can also sign in with your email.
field.currentPasswordUsername: Current password (required to change sign-in ID)
field.notesPlaceholder: Anything you would like your coordinator to know — availability, preferences, etc.

admin.administratorsLead: Demote an administrator to staff or donor. You cannot demote yourself or remove the last administrator.
admin.manageLead: Search and manage accounts. Use Add account to create a user, Edit to update details, or Make admin on a donor to grant administrator access (they must enable 2FA on their profile).

donorDashboard.heroLead: Your support helps provide safe housing, counseling, education, and reintegration services for the girls in Kateri's care.
donorDashboard.noDonationsYet: You haven't made any donations yet. Use the form below to make your first gift!
donorDashboard.realImpactLead: Here's the real impact of your support — pulled directly from your linked giving record.
donorDashboard.help25: helps cover school supplies and basic learning materials.
donorDashboard.help50: supports transportation and case follow-up visits.
donorDashboard.help100: funds meals, hygiene, and daily care essentials.
donorDashboard.help250: helps provide professional counseling and trauma-informed support.
donorDashboard.donateLead: Choose how you'd like to give. Cash, volunteer time, or skilled work — all are automatically routed to safehouses with the greatest current need in your chosen program area. (To donate physical goods, use the In-kind form on the right.)
donorDashboard.transparencyPre: Your gift is automatically routed to the safehouses with the greatest current need in
donorDashboard.transparencySuffix: 10% goes to our General Operating Fund and 5% to a Rainy Day Reserve; the remaining 85% is split across the top 2 most-needy safehouses.
donorDashboard.donateGoodsLead: Tell us what you would like to give. Fields match our in-kind data: category, quantity, unit, total estimated value, intended use, and condition. Value currency is the same as in the monetary section above
donorDashboard.volunteerLead: Tell us how you would like to help the girls.

goods.itemPlaceholder: e.g. School supplies, hygiene kits, rice
goods.totalValuePlaceholder: Total estimated value for this pledge
goods.perUnitHint: We save per-unit value as total ÷ quantity (same structure as our in-kind import).

volunteer.whenHint: Pick days and times of day so we can match you to opportunities. Staff can follow up for exact times.
volunteer.flexibleDays: Flexible on which days I volunteer
volunteer.timeOfDay: Time of day (select all that apply)
volunteer.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Only during school year, prefer virtual for tutoring, etc.
volunteer.helpWith: What would you like to help with?
volunteer.successSuffix: Staff will reach out using your account email.

success.allocatedTail: has been allocated based on current safehouse needs.

goodsSuccess.prefix: Thank you! We recorded your in-kind pledge for
goodsSuccess.suffix: Our team may contact you at your account email to coordinate delivery.

largeGift.eyebrow: Let's talk — this is a big gift
largeGift.heading: Please contact a staff member
largeGift.bodyPre: Thank you for your extraordinary generosity. Individual donations above
largeGift.bodySuffix: need a quick conversation with our team first. This lets us handle tax paperwork, discuss allocation, and clear compliance review.
